summary: LEARN OS Personalization Testing Complete - All features working. Backend: 12/12 tests pass. Frontend: All personalization features verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Personalization implementation follows 'Pet First, Breed Second' doctrine correctly
Pet tags derived correctly from profile (anxious, allergies, high_energy)
Breed tags mapped correctly (Maltese → toy, long_coat)
Relevance scoring works: pet_tags=10 points, breed_tags=5 points, all=1 point
Purple highlight styling applied correctly to personalized cards
Frontend passes pet.id to API and displays 'For {pet_name}' badges
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded content from previous iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: LEARN OS Personalization fully tested. All API endpoints working with pet_id parameter. Frontend correctly displays 'For {pet_name}' shelf at top, badges on cards, and purple highlight border for personalized items.
